outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected. Negative GEX (-5.15B 0DTE, -3.84B Monthly) indicates dealers are short gamma, which will amplify any directional moves. Expect explosive breakout from current compression zone.
outlook.summary: Price compressed between resonance levels at 630-640. Massive PUT OI at 640 (191K total) creates resistance ceiling. Deep negative gamma across all expiries suggests violent resolution ahead. Weekly PCR 3.86 and Monthly PCR 3.71 indicate extreme bearish positioning. Reverse smirk in 0DTE vs smirk in Monthly shows term structure conflict. Watch for break of 640 for short-covering rally or failure at 630 for cascade.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE level across all 3 expiries. 191K total PUT OI (51K 0DTE + 20K Weekly + 121K Monthly). Massive 409K volume in 0DTE indicates active defense. Dealers short puts create selling pressure above this zone.
RESONANCE support with 145K total PUT OI across all expiries. Dealer delta-hedging provides structural bid. Key level for downside rejection.
Significant CALL OI concentration (39K 0DTE + 15K Weekly + 8K Monthly). Secondary resistance zone if 640 breaks. Dealers short calls will hedge by selling on rallies.
0DTE Max Pain level 2.5% above spot. MM optimal expiry target. Acts as price attractor if 640 resistance breaks. Confluence with Weekly Max Pain 664 creates magnetic zone.
ATM strike with massive 156K volume and 18.5K OI in 0DTE. High gamma zone creating price chop and pinning behavior. Spot currently oscillating near this level.
Structural support with 65K total PUT OI. Weekly PCR 3.86 suggests heavy hedging below. Key level for downside crash protection. Failure here triggers gamma cascade.
Deep negative gamma threshold. All expiries show GEX flip well below spot indicating systemic short gamma positioning. Acceleration zone for any major breakdown.

Extreme PCR (1.62-3.46) indicates heavy hedging, but reverse_smirk in 0DTE suggests near-term bullish pressure toward Max Pain. Negative GEX across all expiries creates volatile conditions. Watch for mean reversion toward 6600 or breakdown below 6400.
